title: Public storage bucket detected
description: A storage bucket allows public access. This can expose sensitive files to the internet.
remediation: Disable public access, review bucket policy, and enable least-privilege access controls.

title: Administrator policy assigned to user
description: A user has broad administrator privileges instead of a scoped role.
remediation: Replace direct admin access with role-based permissions and enable MFA.

title: SSH open to the internet
description: Port 22 is exposed to 0.0.0.0/0, increasing brute-force risk.
remediation: Restrict SSH to trusted IP addresses or use a VPN/bastion host.

title: Audit logging is not fully enabled
description: Some administrative actions may not be recorded for investigation and compliance.
remediation: Enable admin activity, data access, and system event logs where required.

title: Volume encryption disabled
description: A disk volume is not encrypted at rest.
remediation: Enable encryption by default and rotate sensitive workloads to encrypted volumes.

title: Soft delete is disabled
description: Deleted objects cannot be recovered if a user or process removes them accidentally.
remediation: Enable soft delete and configure retention based on business requirements.
